questions.objective_ref: Describe what the TensorFlow Embedding Projector is and what it shows on screen.
Explain why high-dimensional embeddings have to be squashed down to 2D or 3D before you can see them.
Read a cluster of points on the Projector and say, in plain language, why those words sit together.
Use the Projector's search-and-highlight feature to find the nearest neighbours of a chosen word.
Rank a small set of word- or sentence-vectors by similarity by hand, then check your ranking against the tool.
Read a cluster of points on the Projector and say, in plain language, why those words sit together.
